get.summary: Get a list of all webhooks registered by a user or company.

post.description: Click **Callbacks** below for a list of events your app can subscribe to. See [API Guide: Webhooks](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/app-dev/webhook/) for implementation details.

get.summary: Occurs when user application settings are modified.
Occurs when a change to a model has been made.
Occurs when a translation request is completed.
Occurs when part or element metadata is modified.
Occurs when a new version of a document is created.
Occurs when a new workspace is created.
Occurs when a workspace is deleted.
Occurs when a version or workspace is merged.
Occurs when a workspace is restored to a previous version or microversion.
Occurs when workspace units or precisions are changed.
Occurs when a new element is created.
Occurs when an element is deleted.
Occurs when an document changes state.
Occurs when a resource is shared.
Occurs when an external reference changes.
Occurs when the element's named views change.
Occurs when a document is created.
Occursˇ when a revision is created.
Occurs when a comment is created in a document.
Occurs when a comment is updated in a document.
Occurs when a comment is deleted in a document.
Occurs when a revision or release package transitions through workflow states.
Occurs when a PLM background job is created.
Occurs when PLM integration settings are modified or disabled.
Occurs either in response to a request by an application to call a registered webhook, or as a post-registration validation initiated by Onshape.
Occurs in response to a notification registration API call.
Occurs in response to a notification deregistation API call.
Get webhook info by webhook ID.

href.description: URI for current page of resources.

items.description: Array of items in the current page.

next.description: URI for next page of the resources if more are available.

previous.description: URI for previous page of the resources.

BTListResponseBTWebhookInfo.description: A list of resources that typically supports paging.

companyId.description: Company admins can register webhooks to listen to all company events.

events.description: List of events for which webhook callback is invoked.

items.description: List of events for which webhook callback is invoked.

externalSessionId.description: Applications can pass this parameter as X-Session-ID with every REST call to distinguish webhooks triggered by self.

isTransient.description: Transient webhooks are automatically cleaned up after a period of inactivity.

scopes.OAuth2ReadPII: Application can read your profile information
scopes.OAuth2Write: Application can write to your documents
scopes.OAuth2Delete: Application can delete your documents and workspaces
scopes.OAuth2Purchase: Application can request purchases on your behalf
scopes.OAuth2Share: Application can share and unshare documents on your behalf
scopes.document.create: Atlas Application can create a document
scopes.document.edit: Atlas Application can edit a document
